Explanation:
From the table, they made the playoffs in the following years:
2001 (3rd qualifier), 2002 (2nd qualifier), 2003 (2nd qualifier), 2004 (2nd qualifier), 2006 (4th qualifier), 2007 (1st qualifier), 2008 (2nd qualifier).
They did not make the playoffs in 2005, 2009, and 2010.
